title: Getting leads from wordpress website or landing page directly to The leads bord
excerpt: How can we receive leads from WordPress to the CRM leads board without using typeform or Monday form?

posts.author: Moayad (Moayad Fahmawi)
posts.cookedHtml: How can we receive leads from WordPress to the CRM leads board without using typeform or Monday form?

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Nachliel from Easyapps here

It depends on what is the reason you want to avoid typeform and monday forms.

In the case you issues is the styling of the forms and embedding them in your page our monday app Easyform may solve you problem.

Easyform builds’ styled monday forms and its submissions populate your board just like a stoke monday form would, with the additional advantage of being customizable and matching your page and brand. You can check out our app in the monday marketplace and our extensive documentation site, including on how to embed the form in a wordpress page .

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

Here is an example of our form in action:

I hope this helps

Nachliel

posts.author: CameronMckirdy (Cameron)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use the email parsing feature in zapier to then create an item in Monday. Works pretty well just a zapier cost you need to pay for.

WordPress form sends email → zapier email parser → zapier to monday.com zap

Let me know if you want more elaboration!

posts.author: RyanKong (Ryan Burkhart)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see a screen shot of your zap. I am not able to get this logic to work for me and to extract the pertinent data.
